title: The same man everywhere
caption:
God sees the man you are in private. So does the version of you that's slowly becoming him.

Integrity isn't what you do when people are watching. It's what you do when they're not.

Four places it shows — swipe through.

#faith #christianmen #integrity #godlymen #manofgod #characterbuilding #bibleverses #spiritualgrowth #christianliving #honesty
